opportunities.opportunity_name: Logan Square Blue Line Station Public Art RFQ
opportunities.budget_text: Artwork commission $180,000 inclusive of all fees.
opportunities.deadline_text: Jury dates scheduled between September 30 and October 19, 2026.
opportunities.eligibility_notes: National eligibility, must engage engineers for execution.
opportunities.why_fit_note: Large‑scale transit station commission with significant budget and integration requirements; ideal for immersive and structural artwork.

opportunities.opportunity_name: Ogden City Kiesel Ave Cable Art Project
opportunities.deadline_text: Complete application must be received on or before March 20, 2026, by midnight MDT.
opportunities.eligibility_notes: Open to artists nationally; Utah-based and Ogden-area artists are strongly encouraged.
opportunities.why_fit_note: Exceptionally aligned with IMO because the brief explicitly supports suspended sculptural, kinetic, and lighting-based installation in a pedestrian urban corridor.

opportunities.opportunity_name: 18th & Lydia Parking Garage Public Artwork (Revive the Vine)
opportunities.budget_text: Maximum budget for the commissioned artwork is $165,000.
opportunities.deadline_text: Deadline to apply is Monday, April 6, 2026.
opportunities.eligibility_notes: Eligibility limited to professional visual artists or artist teams age 18 or older based in the Kansas City CSA.
opportunities.why_fit_note: Strong civic placemaking commission with permanent installation scope, meaningful budget, and clear suitability for sculptural or immersive public-facing work.

opportunities.opportunity_name: Victoria Park Arena - Brampton Sports Hall of Fame Artwork
opportunities.budget_text: Total budget is $90,000 CAD including HST.
opportunities.deadline_text: Submissions due April 20, 2026 at 2:00 PM EDT.
opportunities.eligibility_notes: Open to professional artists and artist teams based in Ontario.
opportunities.why_fit_note: Suspended interior artwork opportunity with architectural integration and strong narrative potential; good fit for experiential, sculptural, and light-responsive approaches.

opportunities.budget_text: Project budget is not to exceed $128,576.
opportunities.deadline_text: Entry deadline: March 16, 2026 at 11:59 p.m. PST.
opportunities.why_fit_note: Airport context, durable public-use requirements, and a solid permanent-art budget make this a credible fit, though the Oregon-only eligibility reduces pursuit priority.

opportunities.opportunity_name: GoRaleigh/GoWake Access Transit Facility Public Art
opportunities.deadline_text: Deadline to apply: April 6, 2026, by 11:59 p.m.
opportunities.why_fit_note: Transit infrastructure setting, public-facing use, and likely need for durable, integrated work align well with IMO's placemaking and systems-thinking strengths.
High-visibility Chicago monument commission with strong civic symbolism and public-realm impact; strategic regional value is high even with limited budget detail visible from the source page.

opportunities.budget_text: The budget for this project is $80,000.
opportunities.deadline_text: RFQ deadline: April 16, 2026, 4:00 p.m. Central Standard Time.
opportunities.why_fit_note: Permanent outdoor sculpture commission tied to placemaking and cultural storytelling; strong contextual and civic fit, though less immersive than some other leads.
